description_long: This is a large, weathered wooden storage box with a rustic, industrial appearance. The box features vertical wooden planks on its sides, with visible grain and signs of aging, such as discoloration and surface wear. The top of the box displays a circular stamp or logo, reading 'CANARD WHITE' with a duck illustration, suggesting it may have been used for shipping or storage of goods. One side of the box has an adhesive shipping label, adding to its utilitarian, urban character. The box appears solid and robust, likely designed to withstand outdoor conditions. Its overall construction is simple, with no visible handles or locking mechanisms, and the lid is a flat, removable panel.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with a stamped logo on top and a shipping label on one side, featuring aged planks and a rustic, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: The front view shows the box's wooden planks and the circular 'CANARD WHITE' logo on the lid, with no visible labels or markings.
description_view_1: This side view reveals an adhesive shipping label on the left side, along with the same weathered wood texture and the logo partially visible on the lid.
description_view_2: The rear view displays plain, aged wooden planks with no labels or distinguishing marks, and the logo is partially visible on the lid.
description_view_3: This side view shows only the weathered wood planks and the logo on the lid, with no labels or additional features.
